zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Giles Argentine於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾時，他的父親Richard de Argentine32歲，母親Cassandra Insula21歲。他於1239年之前與Margery Aguillon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年11月24日之前在英國英格蘭賀特福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Giles Argentine was born about 1210, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Argentine, was 32 and his mother, Cassandra Insula, was 21. He married Margery Aguillon before 1239. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 24 November 1282, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Giles Argentine(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Argentine(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Cassandra Insula(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1239년 이전 Margery Aguillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 11월 24일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 사망했다.
